items.title: Apple's new lineup: A closer look at the MacBook Neo & iPhone 17e
items.description: Apple (AAPL) unveiled several new devices, including the $599 MacBook Neo, updated MacBook Air and Pro models, and the new iPhone 17e. Yahoo Finance Technology Editor Dan Howley showcases how the lineup adds lower-cost options while refreshing Apple’s laptops with new chips. To watch more expert insights and analysis on the latest market action, check out more Market Domination.

items.title: Qualcomm Drops 21% in 2026 — Is BofA Right to Call It a Sell?
items.description: Qualcomm (NASDAQ:QCOM) shares are down roughly 21% year-to-date, trading between $134 and $135 intraday on Wednesday. The stock shed another 3.65% on March 10 after a wave of analyst actions, capped by a fresh Underperform call from Bank of America (NYSE:BAC). The question now is whether the sell-side is finally catching up to a story ... Qualcomm Drops 21% in 2026 — Is BofA Right to Call It a Sell?

items.title: Mophie Introduces Premium Soft Goods Collection for iPhone, iPad, MacBook, and AirTag
items.description: Design-forward cases and covers combine minimalist style with premium materials Mophie Check Cases Mophie’s new Check Case and Optical Check Case both deliver sleek designs with a distinctive checkered pattern and soft-touch finish. Mophie Fabric Knit Case The Mophie Fabric Knit Case offers a premium fabric exterior made from durable AeroKnit™ material that resists daily wear. items.title: BYD Wants To Own A Formula 1 Team: Is EV Giant Eyeing Team That Counts Patrick Mahomes, Travis Kelce, Ryan Reynolds As Investors
items.description: BYD is the top selling EV company in the world. To continue its global growth, BYD has its eyes set on F1 racing to grow its brand.
